---
title: "Home"
---

# Hi there!

I am a first year student of the [Master in Economics](https://www.sciencespo.fr/ecole-recherche/en/academics/masters/master-economics/) at SciencesPo, Paris. 

This website is currently under construction, it's goal will be to share any past and ongoing projects of mine. 

- **Curriculum Vitae:** [CV]()
- **Email:** 

NB: This website was created thanks to the helpful ressource provided by my classmate Paulo, [accessible here](https://www.paulogcd.com/portfolio_tutorial/).
